chunks.title: Oracle Against Babylon
chunks.reason: Introduction and declaration of Babylon's capture.

chunks.title: Return of Israel and Judah
chunks.reason: Promise of return to Yahweh and description of lost sheep.

chunks.title: Call to Flee Babylon
chunks.reason: Command to leave the land and description of its future desolation.

chunks.title: Judgment on Babylon and Restoration
chunks.reason: Battle instructions against Babylon and promise of Israel's restoration.

chunks.title: Specific Targets of Judgment
chunks.reason: List of specific cities and groups to be destroyed.

chunks.title: Vengeance for the Temple
chunks.reason: Call to summon nations and declaration of God's vindication.

chunks.title: Catalog of Destruction
chunks.reason: Series of 'sword' and 'drought' judgments against various groups.

chunks.title: The Northern Army
chunks.reason: Description of the invading army and final confirmation of judgment.
